install.ubuntu: curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com | sh && sudo usermod -aG docker $USER
install.fedora: sudo dnf install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
install.arch: sudo pacman -S --noconfirm docker docker-compose && sudo systemctl enable docker && sudo usermod -aG docker $USER

uninstall.ubuntu: sudo apt-get remove -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io

tools.name: kubectl
tools.version_cmd: kubectl version --client -o json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.clientVersion.gitVersion' | cut -c2- || kubectl version --client 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f6

install.ubuntu: curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.30/deb/Release.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.30/deb/ /' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y kubectl
install.fedora:
cat <<EOF | sudo tee /etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo
[kubernetes]
name=Kubernetes
baseurl=https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.30/rpm/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.30/rpm/repodata/repomd.xml.key
EOF
sudo dnf install -y kubectl
install.default: curl -LO https://dl.k8s.io/release/v1.30.0/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl && sudo install -o root -g root -m 0755 kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl

install.ubuntu: curl https://baltocdn.com/helm/signing.asc | gpg --dearmor | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/helm.gpg > /dev/null && echo 'deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/helm.gpg] https://baltocdn.com/helm/stable/debian/ all main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/helm-stable-debian.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y helm

wget -qO- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg > /dev/null && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y terraform
